protocol.gxtb_exchange: image-space whole-mesh exchange with inverse -ik and forward +ik Fourier transforms; energy and q-dependent shell response are Brillouin-zone contractions per primitive cell
protocol.gxtb_mixer: SCC_MIXER TBLITE (two damped Fock updates, then seven-vector Fock DIIS; ITERATIONS 300)
protocol.gxtb_multik_derivatives: not used in the DMC13 energy-only runs; the coupled whole-mesh reverse mode is available and validated separately by finite-difference and explicit Gamma-supercell force/stress checks
protocol.kpoint_scheme: implicit Gamma plus explicit native-Bloch MacDonald meshes; every non-Gamma GXTB/GFN calculation uses FULL_GRID F with SPGLIB symmetry reduction; CP2K expands the GXTB density and overlap to the coupled full mesh internally before save_tblite evaluation
protocol.reference_note: legacy XI=0.16 retained for GFN1/GFN2 comparability; XI=0.15 sensitivity stored separately

save_tblite.version:
tblite version 0.6.0
ddX support: disabled
HDF5 support: disabled
TREXIO support: disabled
